summary: Completed comprehensive testing of interactive Africa map hover tooltips with AMR resistance data. All features working perfectly.
passed_tests: Africa map displays correctly with 5 country hotspots (Kenya, Uganda, Nigeria, Rwanda, South Africa)
Interactive hover tooltips appear on all hotspots with proper animations
Tooltips show complete AMR data: country name, risk level badge, resistance rate, trend, primary pathogen, affected antibiotics as tags, facilities count, alerts count, last update time
Map legend displays Low/Moderate/High risk color coding correctly
Instruction text 'Hover over hotspots for details' appears as expected
Map shows correctly on scene 4 (Resistance Detection)
Tooltip animations and transitions working smoothly
Scene navigation and auto-advance functionality working
All tooltip content matches expected AMR data format
Mouse hover interactions responsive and accurate
